texto: The authorities? The authorities?” I laughed. “Why is it people think the authorities are some form of gods with either great justice or great, cunning evil, rather than the same plodding fools they see in their daily lives, and most of all in their mirrors?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Richard Ben Sapir que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “The authorities? The authorities?” I laughed. “Why is it people think the authorities are some fo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, government, authorities, com foco em reflexao.
